summary: Morgan Stanley maintained Overweight and raised PT from $135 to $140 (April 22, 2026). HSBC downgraded from Buy to Hold citing weak 2026 outlook. Telsey Advisory maintained Outperform. 27 analysts consensus: Buy. 48 analysts avg PT: $137.6.
